hook: AI gives everyone the same answer. That's the whole problem.
caption:
AI gives everyone the same answer. That's the whole problem.

A lawyer and a songwriter ask ChatGPT the same question about structuring an argument.

The lawyer gets something she has to completely rewrite because it sounds like a college essay.

The songwriter actually loves it because casual and flowing is exactly what he wanted.

Same prompt. Same AI. Completely opposite outcomes based on luck.

This is what people mean when they say "AI doesn't get me" — it's not that the AI is bad. It's that it has zero context for WHO is asking.

It doesn't know you default to systems thinking before you go creative.

It doesn't know you hate bullet points and want dense paragraphs.

It doesn't know you need the counterargument presented BEFORE the recommendation or you don't trust the answer.

So it guesses. And the guess is built for nobody in particular.

bootfile.ai builds a profile of how YOU think — your reasoning style, your communication preferences, your blind spots — and turns it into a portable instruction set you can bring into any AI conversation.

Stop re-explaining yourself every single session.

The AI should adapt to you. Not the other way around.
